title: Angkor Wat sunsets: Limit put on number of tourists watching sunsets at Phnom Bakheng
highlights: Sunset-watching at the Angkor temple complex in Cambodia has been limited after overwhelming numbers of tourists threatened to ruin the tranquil scene so many had travelled to see. The hill at Phnom Bakheng has become so popular with those wanting to watch the sun sink over ancient Khmer ruins that  ...    Now Phoeun Sophoan, the president of Apsara's Tourism Management Agency, has been quoted saying that a maximum of 300 visitors will be allowed at the top of Phnom Bakheng at any one time.  ...    "We have been directing travellers away from the sunset at Phnom Bakheng for years," said Ethan Crowley from About Asia, "as the views have been hampered by overcrowding for nearly a decade now.
